HomeDestinationsChatakpur
West Bengal

Chatakpur

The Eco-Village in the Clouds

Village floating above the clouds, where every morning begins with a sea of mist below your feet.

4.4
(67 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
18°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Chatakpur is a model eco-village offering stunning views of Mt. Kanchenjunga, surrounded by dense forests and rare orchids.

History

Established as a community-led eco-tourism initiative by the forest department and local villagers.

Altitude

2,100 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Darjeeling, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Orchid Sanctuary

Home to rare Himalayan orchids.

Viewpoint

Chatakpur Watchtower

Best views of the surrounding peaks.

KuboVista

Rhododendron Valley

Valley filled with blooming rhododendrons in spring.

Why visit: Spectacular colors and biodiversity

Viewpoints

panoramic

Kanchenjunga View Tower

Unobstructed views of the world's third highest peak.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Eco Kitchen

4.3

Organic Local • ₹200-400

Fresh organic meals with valley views.

Cafes

Mountain Brew

4.2

Specialty: Organic Coffee

Locally grown organic coffee.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Village Cooperative

Organic produce and handicrafts.

Organic teaHandmade soapsWoolen items

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Orchid Trail

Easy

Guided trek to spot rare orchids.

3 hrs
₹700

Activities

  • • Arrive

  • • Community interaction
Lunch, Dinner
Taxi from Darjeeling
Eco lodge
₹2,500

Activities

  • • Sunrise at tower
  • • Village breakfast
  • • Depart
Breakfast
Taxi
N/A
₹1,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

2024-12-15

Beautiful place with stunning views!

Frequently Asked Questions

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
